title: sorbus thomsonii
intro: Sorbus thomsonii, also known as the Himalayan rowan or Thomson's rowan, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the Himalayas. The plant is used in traditional medicine, primarily for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which help to heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Sorbus thomsonii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
